items.summary: Stop using the backend-calculated result for Intrinsic Price and Actual Value outputs, and always compute both outputs using the existing frontend calculation functions (calculateIntrinsicPrice and calculateActualValue) so the displayed results match the previously-correct formula behavior.
Update the developer verification check flow to validate the restored frontend formulas (not backend-derived values), so running the dev check reflects the rolled-back calculation logic.

Ensure the backend calculation request does not block or degrade the user experience after the rollback (e.g., remove/disable backend loading and error UI states that are only relevant when backend results drive the displayed outputs).
